provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, small cute baby reptilian alien with big round innocent eyes and smooth pastel green skin, wearing a tiny adorable bronze outfit with a little cape and a miniature sword, the scales are smooth and clean and the expression is friendly and approachable, everything about this creature is designed to be endearing rather than martial, it looks like a mascot character not a member of a warrior culture
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Cute baby reptilian with big round eyes, pastel skin, tiny adorable outfit. Mascot character not warrior culture. Violates faction identity completely.
